name: closeeye
description: Close Eye monorepo root. The product application is closeeye-next/ (Next.js) — the single authoritative Close Eye codebase. This root holds shared infrastructure only: the Supabase backend (supabase/), production E2E tests (e2e/, Playwright), unit tests (tests/), CI (.github/workflows — Android/iOS builds run inside closeeye-next/), and dev scripts (scripts/).
